# TypesenseKit API Coverage

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-api-coverage.mjs. Do not edit directly. -->

TypesenseKit currently exposes **95 operations** from its shared registry. The first-class compatibility target is [Typesense v30.2](https://typesense.org/docs/30.2/api/), with the official [Typesense OpenAPI specification](https://github.com/typesense/typesense-api-spec) used as the endpoint reference.

| Category | Count | Operations |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| aliases | 4 | `aliases.create`<br>`aliases.delete`<br>`aliases.list`<br>`aliases.retrieve` |
| analytics | 9 | `analytics.events.create`<br>`analytics.events.list`<br>`analytics.flush`<br>`analytics.rules.create`<br>`analytics.rules.delete`<br>`analytics.rules.list`<br>`analytics.rules.retrieve`<br>`analytics.rules.upsert`<br>`analytics.status` |
| api | 1 | `api.call` |
| collections | 9 | `collections.create`<br>`collections.delete`<br>`collections.fields.add`<br>`collections.fields.drop`<br>`collections.fields.replace`<br>`collections.list`<br>`collections.retrieve`<br>`collections.update`<br>`collections.wait` |
| conversations | 5 | `conversations.history.retrieve`<br>`conversations.models.create`<br>`conversations.models.delete`<br>`conversations.models.list`<br>`conversations.models.retrieve` |
| curations | 8 | `curation_sets.delete`<br>`curation_sets.items.delete`<br>`curation_sets.items.list`<br>`curation_sets.items.retrieve`<br>`curation_sets.items.upsert`<br>`curation_sets.list`<br>`curation_sets.retrieve`<br>`curation_sets.upsert` |
| documents | 9 | `documents.delete`<br>`documents.export`<br>`documents.get_many`<br>`documents.get`<br>`documents.import`<br>`documents.index`<br>`documents.search`<br>`documents.update`<br>`documents.upsert` |
| keys | 4 | `keys.create`<br>`keys.delete`<br>`keys.list`<br>`keys.retrieve` |
| nl_search_models | 5 | `nl_search_models.create`<br>`nl_search_models.delete`<br>`nl_search_models.list`<br>`nl_search_models.retrieve`<br>`nl_search_models.update` |
| overrides | 4 | `overrides.create`<br>`overrides.delete`<br>`overrides.list`<br>`overrides.retrieve` |
| presets | 4 | `presets.create`<br>`presets.delete`<br>`presets.list`<br>`presets.retrieve` |
| search | 4 | `multi_search`<br>`search.facets`<br>`search.suggestions`<br>`search` |

| system | 10 | `debug`<br>`health`<br>`metrics`<br>`operations.cache.clear`<br>`operations.db.compact`<br>`operations.schema_changes`<br>`operations.slow_requests.configure`<br>`operations.snapshot`<br>`operations.vote`<br>`stats` |

## Compatibility Notes

- Global `synonym_sets.*` and `curation_sets.*` operations target Typesense v30.
- Collection-scoped `synonyms.*` and `overrides.*` are retained for Typesense v27-v29 compatibility and migrations.
- `api.call` remains the escape hatch for endpoints not yet represented by a first-class operation. It is excluded from default read-only MCP mode.
- Route-level tests validate the current HTTP method, path, query, and body contracts for first-class v30 operations.
